name: Almohad Caliphate
note: Founded by Ibn Tumart's Masmuda Berber religious movement proclaiming Almohad (monotheist) theology. Defeated the Almoravids. At its peak ruled from Iberia to Libya — the largest Berber empire in history. Defeated at Las Navas de Tolosa (1212) which broke Almohad power in Iberia.
